articles.author: Jon Gambrell
articles.title: US attacks Iran and Tehran retaliates across the Middle East, threatening a return to all-out war - AP News
articles.description: The U.S. launched strikes on Iran hours after President Donald Trump vowed to reinstate an American blockade of Iranian ports and charge ships for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran responded with attacks on Middle East allies of the U.S. The act…
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) The U.S. launched strikes on Iran early Tuesday, hours after President Donald Trump vowed to reinstate an American blockade of Iranian ports and charge ships for safe… [+6366 chars]
